note: payments.status is an unconstrained text column; allowed values are enforced in application code (lib/types.ts). AIVA must reuse the reconciliation primitives, never re-derive paid/outstanding logic.

INITIATED.meaning: Checkout intent created on 'Pay' click. NOT money.

PENDING.meaning: Gateway in-flight (within ~120 min window). NOT money.

VERIFYING.meaning: Re-checking with ICICI; timer moves PENDING->VERIFYING (never auto-FAILED).

ABANDONED.meaning: Evidence-less INITIATED/PENDING expired (~30 min sweep). History only.

supersede.rule: When one attempt in a group becomes PAID, unpaid siblings get is_superseded=true. No SUPERSEDED status value. Two PAID rows in a group => possible duplicate, flagged, never auto-superseded.

soft_delete.rule: Live money/access reads filter deleted_at IS NULL.

proofs.rule: Proof upload elevates group to 'verifying'; accepted counts as approved. Proof NEVER grants access; only PAID/captured does.

values.in_progress: confirmed but settling (RIP/SIP); access still granted

reconciliation_rules_v1: Imported/manual verified payments count as paid.
Pending/verifying/checkout-opened do not count as paid.
Duplicate attempts do not create duplicate enrollments.
Outstanding is based on active enrollment/payment plan.
Proof uploaded enters verification, not paid.
Approved proof becomes paid through trusted logic (acceptPaymentManually).
A paid attempt suppresses reminders for superseded attempts.
Cancelled/expired enrollments do not inflate outstanding revenue.
aiva_must_never_v1: Mark a payment paid without trusted evidence
